title: Polaroid Camera
description: A mod that adds a camera that allows players to take pictures and put them on maps.
body:
# Polaroid Camera A mod for Minecraft that adds a camera that takes pictures and puts them on maps. **You do not need Sinytra Connector and Forgified Fabric API if you are playing on Fabric.** [![](https://i3.ytimg.com/vi/e3Xqu_grFm0/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e3Xqu_grFm0) ## Camera crafting recipe: ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/459/705/310/172/2022-05-05_17.png) You can take zoom in and out and adjust the angle of the camera using the mouse scroll wheel and the WASD keys respectively. You can take a picture by pressing C when using the camera. If you have an empty map in your inventory, then your photo will be copied onto the map. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/459/704/310/172/2022-05-05_17.png) ## Credits: Image2Map: https://github.com/TheEssem/Image2Map hannah wavelyte (camera texture): https://twitter.com/hannahwavelyte
